text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Agnes Tachyon will be training in her
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... I'm generally not particular about
clothing, but I like this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The fabric and design have no special
characteristics besides to protect the body.
However...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Neat Racewear
text_block_list.text: Wow! That design is super bold!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Flashy Racewear
text_block_list.text:
Yours has a much calmer vibe. But it suits you.
Not bad at all.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Neat Racewear
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'm glad I chose this design. ...I gotta
admit, signature racewear really is something
special, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Flashy Racewear
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Wearing this gives me like a surge of
motivation.. really makes me feel I've gotta give
it my all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Did you hear that conversation just now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Each Umamusume has her own particular style
when it comes to signature racewear. I believe
there lies hidden potential in that choice.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Do you know what it is?
choice_data_list: Something like the power of dreams?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, you understand well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Dreams... the power to believe. We shouldn't
think it entirely unrelated to science.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's right... Simply put, it's something akin to
conviction or motivation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Things like being number one, being in the lead,
or never losing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It may very well be that contained within each
signature racewear are these hopes and
aspirations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this power of dreams is a hypothetical
concept that has yet to be proven.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, it seems apparent that Umamusume
believe in that power, choosing to infuse their
wishes into their racewear.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I suppose... I can't say if I believe it or not, but I
have chosen to infuse something into mine as
well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, try and guess what it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is attempting to go beyond the
limits of Umamusume—to tap into her true
potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's infused something in her signature
racewear, it must be...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, you have an answer?
choice_data_list:
Your dedication to the potential of
Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's right! You could say it captures my
belief.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of what lies ahead, I'll continue my
research and search for potential...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Until the day I attain the ultimate Umamusume
body!
choice_data_list: I'll support you however I can!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! Nice answer! Then, let's proceed with
the experiment right away!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What this signature racewear holds for me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Is my determination to see this experiment
through!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll advance my developments in body
modification... and dash forward with all my
might!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's start with turf! Be sure to keep time,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! It's wonderful that you understand so
well!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Running, to me, is both the experiment and the mechanism through which I will reach that potential!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Of course, my running alone won't be enough.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Each person's desires and wishes differ, and thus,
so will what they gain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Those differences might be trivial in the end.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: However! They cannot be overlooked!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to experiments, the slightest
differences can lead to potential breakthroughs!
They can yield significant results!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, if you understand, then let's get ready
to record some results right away!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume clad in one-of-a-kind racewear
infused with their determination...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We won't get a better chance to observe their
running up close!
